# xlRate -- Feature / Task Issue Template

## Type

-   [ ] Feature
-   [ ] Bug
-   [ ] Refactor
-   [ ] Documentation
-   [ ] Infrastructure

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Summary

(One clear sentence describing the change.)

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Problem Statement

What problem does this solve? Why does this matter right now? How does
it align with the current milestone?

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Scope Definition

## What IS included in this issue:

## What is explicitly NOT included:

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Acceptance Criteria

-   [ ] Criteria 1
-   [ ] Criteria 2
-   [ ] Criteria 3

(Each item must be objectively testable.)

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Smallest Executable Slice

Describe the smallest vertical slice that delivers value.

If this issue feels large, break it into smaller issues before coding.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Technical Notes (Optional)

-   Affected layer(s): UI / Engine / Storage / Tests
-   Any edge cases?
-   Any architectural concerns?

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Definition of Done

-   [ ] Branch created from issue
-   [ ] Code implemented
-   [ ] Tests updated (if applicable)
-   [ ] No unrelated refactors
-   [ ] PR opened and linked to issue
-   [ ] Version updated (if behavior changed)
-   [ ] Branch deleted after merge
